title: Abrodictyum stylosum
taxonomy: Abrodictyum stylosum is classified within the family Dipterocarpaceae and the order Malvales. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The class is Magnoliopsida and the family is Dipterocarpaceae. Abrodictyum stylosum is also known to belong to the genus Abrodictyum and the family Hymenophyllaceae in some classifications. However, the classification may vary based on different sources and recent taxonomic revisions.
uses: Abrodictyum stylosum, also known as the club fern, is a plant species with potential medicinal properties.
